history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, high-angle selfie of a young woman with long, dark hair framing her face. Her skin is illuminated by a pinkish-red light, giving it a warm, almost ethereal glow. She has full lips pursed slightly, with dramatic eye makeup featuring sharp, arched eyebrows and long eyelashes. Her right hand is resting on her cheek, with her fingers gently touching her face. She is wearing an orange t-shirt with a green collar and green lettering that appears to spell out "BRASIL," along with the Brazilian flag emblem on the chest. To the right of her head, a plush panda toy is visible, peeking into the frame. The background is softly blurred, suggesting an indoor setting with a white wall and possibly a window or curtain. The overall mood is intimate and playful, with a touch of a dreamy, stylized aesthetic due to the lighting.
